1.prompt: Yahu: Good evening, my favorite Likudling! Seems things are going alright as is. Just make sure you don’t let our customers down too much… By the way, have I ever told you the way I feel about really efficient employees? Oh, efficient employees… Oh man… Those are HOT! When I see an employee who’s really really good at their job, I really wanna just force them into marriage!

options.response: I’m under investigation for war crimes. Do you really think I care if I’m a creep? Do your job.

2.prompt: Welp, that's all! Head back to work and keep up the good job!
